shellCommands.command: git status --short && rg "disabled|shouldDirty|isDirty" src/logic src -g '*.ts' -g '*.tsx' | head -200
grep -RIn "type GetIsDirty\|GetIsDirty" src | head -20 && sed -n '1850,1980p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts
sed -n '290,335p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1680,1710p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1815,1850p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '800,825p' src/types/form.ts

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('src/logic/createFormControl.ts')
s=p.read_text()
if not s.endswith('\n'):
    p.write_text(s+'\n')
PY
git diff --check && git diff --stat && git status --short
npm run build >/tmp/rhf-build.log 2>&1; code=$?; tail -30 /tmp/rhf-build.log; exit $code
git diff --check && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts && git status --short

tail -c 20 src/logic/createFormControl.ts | od -An -t x1; python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('src/logic/createFormControl.ts')
s=p.read_bytes()
print(s[-10:])
if not s.endswith(b'\n'): p.write_bytes(s+b'\n')
PY
git diff --check
git diff --stat && git diff --check && git status --short
